prompt: Keep this photograph almost entirely as-is — same woman, same identity and face, same natural skin texture and light freckles, same blue floral dress, same whitewashed courtyard, same dramatic directional lighting and warm faded-film grade. Keep both hands resting on her hips exactly as they are. Keep her hair natural and softly tousled but tidy and pretty — NOT messy, wild, or dishevelled; relaxed and groomed. Make ONE pose change: lower her lifted left leg (her left side, on the RIGHT of the image) so that foot comes down and rests flat and planted on the ground, a natural relaxed standing stance with a slight easy weight shift — the foot stays fully on the floor, not lifted on the toes. As the leg lowers, let the skirt fall naturally: the hem drapes straight down to its normal mid-calf midi length on that side, no longer hitched or riding up on the thigh, with no hand touching it. Natural, elegant, composed. Photorealistic, correct anatomy, seamless, believable.
